nasb.text: He inserted the poles into the rings on the sides of the altar, with which to carry it. He made it hollow with planks.

esv.text: And he put the poles through the rings on the sides of the altar to carry it with them. He made it hollow, with boards.

cnv.text: 把槓穿在壇兩側的環裡，用來抬壇；壇是用木板做的，是空的。

ccb.text: 把横杠穿在坛边的铜环里，以便抬坛。坛是中空的，用木板制作。
